integration_validation_v2.gap: LLM Evidence Pack Fixture Corpus deliverable is absent: no evidence-pack fixture JSON and no fixture-corpus round-trip test for it.
integration_validation_v2.evidence: tests/atelier_fixture_corpus_tests.rs covers only MT-061..065; ls fixtures/atelier_core_data has no evidence_pack fixture; grep llm_evidence/evidence_pack in tests/fixtures returns nothing. The MT-072 pure-function test (atelier_core_data_tests.rs:7027) constructs files programmatically, not from a portable fixture corpus

integration_validation_v3.evidence: Fixture llm_evidence_pack.json (4 required files with source_anchors + redaction flags, sqlite:// and .GOV invalid probes). Test mt078 at atelier_fixture_corpus_tests.rs:2015: payloads persisted via real store+ArtifactStore then re-read from PG; production build/validate_llm_evidence_pack_manifest; deterministic 4-file order, anchors, artifact:// refs, no SQLite/machine-local anchors, redaction flags; 4 rejection probes; EventLedger MEDIA_ASSET_MATERIALIZED per payload.
integration_validation_v3.basis: v3 adversarial per-MT review of remediated deliverable + runtime proof via full-crate managed-PG sweep and kernel-builder fresh-DB proof logs

minimum_controls: Use contract-first identity and preserve projection hash.
risks: Imported MT contract may under-capture prose-only review or proof instructions.

proof_targets: cargo test + runtime proof vs PostgreSQL/EventLedger
